top_signals.title: Emerging Currencies Dip as Oil, Dollar Spike Over Iran Worries
top_signals.summary: Most developing-world currencies fell Thursday as renewed worries about tensions in the Middle East lifted oil prices in another risk-off session in global markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US launches new round of strikes against Iran
top_signals.summary: The U.S. conducted a new wave of strikes against Iranian military sites on Wednesday after reimposing a naval blockade of the Islamic Republic's ports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US Air Force turns to cheaper cruise missiles it can buy by the thousands
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Air Force is turning to cruise missiles it can buy by the thousand, cheap enough to shoot many for less than it once cost to shoot one.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump blasts New York AI data center moratorium, says state should change policy 'immediately'
top_signals.summary: New York became the first state in the U.S. to impose a ban of its kind when the governor signed the executive order Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: We need humanities more than ever in the age of AI
top_signals.summary: Subjects like literature, languages and history are vital to a thoughtful and prosperous society
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Huawei aims for growth, Malaysia moves into batteries
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: The digital transformation of money, payments and finance
Faena Condo Project Sells $30 Million Penthouse on Miami River
top_signals.summary: Argentine fashion entrepreneur-turned-developer Alan Faena sold a $30 million penthouse in his planned twin condo towers on the Miami River, a milestone in the mission to take his maximalist, theatrical brand worldwide.
